use_cases: Selecting single dates for appointments, bookings, or scheduling
Picking date ranges for reports, filters, or travel planning
Quick date input in forms without manual typing
Calendar view navigation for event scheduling interfaces
Date-based filtering in dashboards and data tables
ai_summary: A universal date picker component for selecting dates and date ranges with calendar interface. Features multiple interaction modes including click-to-reveal calendar, hover states, and keyboard navigation support. Part of the ruixen.ui component library with a clean, flat design aesthetic suitable for various form and data-entry contexts across desktop and mobile platforms.
